# BizGrants Consulting

> Singapore CCP, Job Redesign Grant, and SkillsFuture grant advisory for SME and corporate employers. Founded 2023. Success-fee model, employers pay only when grants are approved. Office at 60 Paya Lebar Road, #06-28, Paya Lebar Square, Singapore 409051.

## Glossary

- **CCP**, Career Conversion Programme: Workforce Singapore funding that supports employers to hire or reskill mid-career workers (Singapore Citizens and PRs) into new or redesigned roles, with structured on-the-job training (OJT).
- **WSG**, Workforce Singapore: the statutory board administering CCP, Job Redesign Grants, and related employment-support schemes.
- **JRG**, Job Redesign Grant: funding to redesign existing roles for productivity, transformation, or technology adoption.
- **SkillsFuture**, Singapore's national upskilling movement; SkillsFuture-supported funding underpins many CCPs and reskilling initiatives.
- **OJT**, On-the-Job Training: structured, supervised training delivered as part of an employee's day-to-day work, central to every CCP application.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://bizgrants.consulting/): Overview of the firm and headline funding scenarios
- [Services](https://bizgrants.consulting/services.html): CCP and Job Redesign Grant advisory services
- [About BizGrants Consulting](https://bizgrants.consulting/about.html): Firm profile, advisory principles, and engagement model
- [Pathways](https://bizgrants.consulting/pathways.html): All CCP pathways with eligibility, salary minimums, and supported job families
- [Contact](https://bizgrants.consulting/contact.html): Free consultation, NAP details

## Pillar guides

- [WSG Career Conversion Programme](https://bizgrants.consulting/wsg-career-conversion-programme.html): Definitive employer guide to the WSG CCP
- [CCP for Employers](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-for-employers.html): Step-by-step employer journey from eligibility to claims
- [CCP Grant Funding](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-grant-singapore.html): How CCP funding works, caps, supported items, evidence
- [Career Conversion Programmes overview](https://bizgrants.consulting/career-conversion-programmes.html): Plain-English orientation for HR and business owners
- [CCP for Digital Marketing roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-digital-marketing.html): Role design and OJT examples for digital roles
- [CCP for Sustainability roles](https://bizgrants.consulting/ccp-sustainability.html): Role design and OJT examples for sustainability/ESG roles

- [CCP Eligibility](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-eligibility.html): Who qualifies for the Career Conversion Programme

- [CCP vs JGI vs SFEC](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-vs-jgi-sfec.html): Comparing CCP, Jobs Growth Incentive, and SFEC for employers
- [CCP Reskilling Examples](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-reskilling-examples.html): Real Singapore reskilling use cases
- [CCP Flat-fee vs Success-fee Consulting](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-flatfee-consulting.html): Why success-fee beats flat-fee for grant advisory
- [CCP Hiring Grants](https://bizgrants.consulting/blog/ccp-hiring-grants.html): GRIT vs MCPP vs CCP, which programme fits SME hiring
